summary: Round 1: build/typecheck/unit(397)/e2e(84, incl. 5 new) all green; every plan acceptance-criteria check (Issue 1a/1b/2/3, regression sweep, interactive-HTML twin parity in a real browser) verified hands-on against real pixels with before/after comparisons proving improvement not regression; zero issues found; added e2e/render-fixes-v0.6.1.spec.ts to close a gap (no prior real-browser assertion of the FR2/FR3 shapes). Done-bar met; advancing to report.
